files.notes: This file contains multiple lesson sections merged together. The first section appears to be part of an excursion article that was cut off, followed by three complete Guide Lessons for December covering Theology, Literature, and Social Service topics. The lessons are clearly delineated with Roman numeral headings and distinct subject matter changes.
